first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (7/10), and both evaluations identify the same core strengths (extensive experience, technical leadership) and weaknesses (lack of direct mobile tooling experience, no formal people management). The minor differences in wording and the one-year discrepancy in experience calculation are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation for the model and do not suggest that the redaction of the candidate's name and personal URLs had any meaningful impact on the assessment.
